entries.cow: place cards on the board. Use the letters to spell: cow
entries.box: nice! Try this one next: box
entries.herd:
excellent! Let's up the difficulty: herd 
 Try combining a Cow card with a Cow on the board.
entries.inferno: one final, very useful word: inferno
entries.ok: great work! you can keep track of discovered cards and combos in the dex. check out endless and the daily packs for more words to try!
